description: Cilium codebase orientation — explore project structure, core packages, and extension patterns
local_clone_commands: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/sg-evals/cilium--v1.16.5.git . && git config user.email "agent@example.com" && git config user.name "Agent"
git clone --filter=blob:none --no-checkout https://github.com/cilium/cilium.git . && git checkout v1.16.5 && git config user.email "agent@example.com" && git config user.name "Agent"
dependency_hints: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl python3 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates python3 curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
